untranslatable_reason: Signal requires order book microstructure data (current best bid/offer, quote confirmation, time precedence, aggressive buying/selling pressure detection) which are NOT available in the allowed indicator list. The signal is fundamentally about high-frequency quote positioning and time-priority mechanics that cannot be expressed using only OHLCV and technical indicators. Parameters like 'hold_duration_seconds' (2 seconds), 'min_price_improvement_ticks' (1 tick), and detection of 'another trader showing interest' require real-time market microstructure data.
translation_notes: This is a microstructure/market-making signal requiring order book state, quote status, and time-priority tracking. It cannot be translated to a backtestable technical rule using only price and volume indicators. Recommend implementing as a separate market microstructure module if order book data is available.
